# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-LFC-003](task-0037): Fresh Install Apply/Validate

## Purpose

Apply fresh install and validate.

## Scope

- Install apply
- Validation
- Error handling

## Implementation

1. Implement apply
2. Add validation
3. Handle errors

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Install applies correctly
2. Validation passes
3. Errors handled
